name: Spetsioteko Psari (Baked Fish Greek Style)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Pour 1/4 cup oil evenly into a 14x9x2 inch baking dish.
3. Sprinkle 1/2 cup bread crumbs evenly over the oil.
4. Place fillets in a single layer in the baking dish; sprinkle with 1 teaspoon salt.
5. Pour lemon juice on top.
6. Mix 1/2 cup olive oil, tomato sauce, parsley, wine, garlic, 1 teaspoon salt, and pepper; spoon over fillets.
7. Sprinkle with 1/2 cup bread crumbs.
8. Bake uncovered until golden brown, about 40 minutes.
9. Remove fillets to a warm platter.
NOTE: 2 pounds fresh or frozen (thawed) cod, haddock, halibut, or yellow pike fillets can be substituted for the red snapper fillets.
